Market: While Alive: A shop is opened that can be accessed anytime by middle-clicking on the Merchant Crab. The shop contains 4 cards with differing chances for rarities. The cards are discounted by [1], when bought they dissapear from the shop. Every Merchant Crab contains a random shop.
Mutant: Can attack adjacent non-diagonal tiles; Counts as having HORIZONTAL
Glorious: Shuffle a linked Vanessa into your deck with [+1/1]; If there already is a linked Vanessa in your deck or hand give it [+1/1]
Architect:
The buildings Lóni inserted grant him a specific effect when placed:

		When the spawner is placed Loni spawns the unit in front (it doesn't sleep)

		When the wall is placed Lóni gains the effect of the wall

		When the turret is placed Lóni gains the attack and health of the turret.
Aides: They AWAKEN on the corresponding position to Silas III, remove from hand and shuffle a copy of themselves into your deck
Drain: All Drained units are debuffed [1] HP and give [1] Blood if they don't die
Blast: Deal [2] Magical DMG; If Blast kills an enemy it triggers Shadow Cactus's RAMPAGE
Gigaladon: Deal [3] Magical DMG and apply [2] Venom to any units on or adjacent to the chosen tile; A turn before it unleashes the chosen tile is revealed; Princefish gains [+1/1] per unit hit
Ice Tile: Lasts for [4] Turns; Only one Weather can be play in at any time; Weather can be overridden by either player
